title: Juno (freighter group)
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
{{Otheruses|Juno}}
[[File:Juno_3_X-Wing_CD.jpg|250px|thumb|Farlander attacks freighter ''Juno'' 3]]
'''''Juno''''' was a group of three [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] used by the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

During [[Operation Strike Fear]], shortly after the [[Battle of Brigia (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Brigia]], the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Invincible (Strike Fear)|''Invincible'']] was in need of resupplies ahead of a planned attack on [[Rudrig/Legends|Rudrig]]. The [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Ranger (CR90 corvette)|''Ranger'']], formed a supply convoy with Juno, carrying [[Droid/Legends|droids]] (''Juno 1''), food (''Juno 2'') and machinery (''Juno 3'') to ''Invincible'' under [[TIE series/Legends|TIE]] escort.

The convoy came under attack from a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] raiding party. Two [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wings]] from [[Red Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Red Squadron]] flown by [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]] and [[Sunnar Jan-lo]] arrived first and drew off the convoy's escort. Two [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wings]] from [[Blue Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Blue Squadron]] arrived shortly after and attacked the now defenseless convoy. All three freighters were destroyed.

The loss of the convoy disrupted Operation Strike Fear for several weeks.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: X-Wing (video game)|''Star Wars: X-Wing'']] {{1st}}
